name: 54th Street Restaurant & Drafthouse- Zona Rosa
description: 54th Street Restaurant & Drafthouse- Zona Rosa is a place to play pickleball in Kansas City, MO. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights and restrooms. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.
hours: Thursday 11 am - 11* pm Friday & Saturday 11 am

name: Char Bar - Parkville
description:
To schedule a Lesson or any other questions, please call directly at 816-622-9600 ext. 5 
Paddle Rental: $5
Ball Purchase: $3 
**24 Hour Cancellation Policy on all Court Rentals in order to receive full refund
fees: Private — 0700-1000 or 2100-1100 Open Play $5 plus tax; 1000-2100 Court Reservations $20-30 per hour; Memberships available

name: Chicken N Pickle - Kansas City
description: Chicken N Pickle is an indoor/outdoor entertainment complex that boasts a fast casual dining restaurant, 8 pickleball courts (4 indoor and 4 outdoor), a bar and entertainment space, food trucks, outdoor lawn games like ping pong and Jenga and a living room with fire pits and TV screens for you and your friends to catch your favorite game.
fees: Fee required — Weekends are always $40/hr. Weekdays before 5pm are $20/hr and after 5pm go up to $40/hr.

name: Clayview Country Club
description: Clayview Country Club is a place to play pickleball in Kansas City, MO. There are 8 hard courts. 6 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

description:
Discover SW19 at the Stadium — Kansas City’s newest destination for fun, flavor, and unforgettable experiences!
Serve up good times on our premium pickleball courts, then refuel at our full‑service restaurant, bar, and café. Whether you're planning a private event, team outing, or just a night out with friends, SW19 delivers the perfect mix of play and hospitality.
Eat. Drink. Play. Celebrate.
All in one place — all at SW19
